question: Create an `Employee` class with `name` and `id`. Design a `Team` class that manages an array of `Employee` pointers to represent team members. Demonstrate adding employees to the team without the team owning their memory.

test_cases.expected:
Added employee Alice Johnson to team.
Added employee Bob Smith to team.
Added employee Charlie Brown to team.
Cannot add a null employee pointer to the team.

--- Team Members ---
Employee ID: 101, Name: Alice Johnson
Employee ID: 102, Name: Bob Smith
Employee ID: 103, Name: Charlie Brown
--------------------
Added employee Diana Prince to team.

--- Team Members ---
Employee ID: 101, Name: Alice Johnson
Employee ID: 102, Name: Bob Smith
Employee ID: 103, Name: Charlie Brown
Employee ID: 104, Name: Diana Prince
--------------------
